title: Zenith Tools Deluxe
description: Replace Netherite and more with textures themed off the Zenith from Terraria
body:
Every Tool Item has been recolored to look like Terraria's Zenith
![A shelf of tools that look super cool and purple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efe354d9953d3d4b91b0fa0813fa4d09ac3a0393.png)
